name: C2xSetTokenBitString
title: C2xSetTokenBitString
syntax: long C2xSetTokenBitString( long packet, char protocolDesignator[], char tokenDesignator[], long bufferSize, byte buffer[] ); // form 1
long C2xSetTokenBitString( long packet, char protocolDesignator[], char tokenDesignator[], long bufferSize, char buffer[] ); // form 2
description: This function sets the bit string of a token.

parameters.name: packet
parameters.description: Handle of a packet that has been created with C2xInitPacket.

parameters.name: protocolDesignator
parameters.description: Name of the protocol, e.g. userDefinedPayload.

parameters.name: tokenDesignator
parameters.description: Name of the token, e.g. bitString.

parameters.name: buffer
parameters.description: Buffer in which the data is copied.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
